You're One Step Away From Breaking Through! Complete your registration below and secure your seat at the event that will change your life forever.

Secure Your Breakthrough Now Join 20,000+ Filipinos who've already transformed their money blueprint

LIMITED SEATS LEFT...

FIRST TIME IN CEBU | MAY 29 - MAY 31, 2026

FIRST TIME IN CEBU

MAY 29 - MAY 31, 2026

You don’t have a money problem.
You have an identity problem.

MMI Cebu rewires the unconscious money patterns shaping your income, decisions, and self-image in one immersive weekend.

Three days. One internal shift.
Different financial trajectory.

IEC Convention Center, Cebu | 3-Day Live In-Person

IEC Convention Center, Cebu
3-Day Live In-Person

Limited seats available! Get yours before they're sold out!

The Unmessable: Preview

End the Internal Bottleneck

Limiting Your Growth

Identify what’s been driving your decisions, draining your energy, and keeping your business heavier than it needs to be.

One day. Real shifts. Immediate clarity.  The beginning of a transformation most entrepreneurs never access.

June 20, 2026 | 10:00AM – 5:00PM

Venue: 2F, Synergist Room, Philippine Trade Training Center, Roxas Boulevard cor. Sen. Gil J. Puyat Ave, Pasay City

Limited seats available! Get yours before they're sold out!

In Business, what is limiting you most often is rarely technical.

It’s your way of thinking.

You've read the books. Hired the consultants. Implemented the systems. Yet somehow, you keep hitting the same ceiling.

What if the next level of your business isn't about doing more, but about seeing what you've never seen before?

This Isn't Another Business Strategy Session

This is about the invisible phenomenon behind every business result you’ve ever created.

The need to control everything that's actually preventing you from scaling.

The fear of being \"found out\" that keeps you from delegating.

The equation of self-worth with success that's costing you your peace, relationships, and creativity.

The constant need to prove yourself that’s draining your team and your energy.

These aren't just 'mindset problems.' They're the operating system determining every decision you make, every risk you won't take, and every result you're not getting.

But once you can see them, you can shift them. And that shift is the doorway to a level of performance most people don't even know exists.

What This Session Will Do

On June 20, 2026 | 10:00AM – 5:00PM

You will get to the source of performance, and experience a breakthrough in how you see yourself, your business, and what's actually possible.

This isn't theory. This is Ontology, the science of BEING.

Think of this as your entry point into a world of extraordinary performance - a first encounter with a way of operating that changes everything that follows.

The Real Constraint to Scale

See how hidden fears and trust issues shape your control tendencies and how addressing this opens the floodgates to delegation, collaboration, and exponential growth.

Why Your Best Customers Stay (Or Leave)

See how hidden fears and trust issues shape your control tendencies and how addressing this opens the floodgates to delegation, collaboration, and exponential growth.

The Freedom-Success Paradox

Most entrepreneurs sacrifice freedom, fulfillment, and joy chasing success. What if success became the byproduct of being free, fulfilled, and alive? Imagine running your business from that place.

Limited seats available! Get yours before they're sold out!

What You’ll Experience in 7 Hours

Transformational Conversation.

See your business through a new lens, the lens of who you’re being, not just what you’re doing.

Breakthrough Exercises.

Bring your actual business challenges. Through guided inquiry, you’ll uncover what’s been running your decisions and holding back your growth.

Real-Time Shifts.

You won’t just learn; you’ll see differently. When you see what you couldn't see before, new actions become possible. Participants often experience immediate clarity on decisions they've been avoiding for months.

And here's what most don't expect: this is just the first layer. What opens up after this day is a depth of transformation that builds over time.

You’ll Walk Away With:

Insight into your invisible constraints finally see what’s been running the show.

Freedom from fear and overthinking take bold action with grounded confidence.

Access to power under pressure stay calm, clear, and creative no matter what’s happening.

A 5-minute daily practice stay calm, clear, and creative no matter what’s happening.

The doorway to the full Unmessable Retreat. If this resonates, you’ll know exactly what’s next.

And the awareness that this is only the beginning.

One Day that could change how you lead forever.

Aljor is a master of Ontology—the science of BEING. His work has helped entrepreneurs break through the invisible constraints that strategies alone can't solve.

His approach is simple: You are the expert in your life and business.

He is the expert in transformation. When you bring your challenges into the conversation and see them through the lens of who you're being, what was previously hidden becomes visible. And when you can see it, you can transform it.

Those who continue the journey beyond this day consistently report not just business breakthroughs, but a complete shift in how they experience their lives, relationships, and sense of freedom.

This Preview is where that journey begins.

What You’ll discover?

Why achieving more isn't solving the emptiness

The hidden cost of your current success

What's really keeping you stuck (it's not what you think)

The shift that changes everything

And more…

After this event you'll have:

A new relationship with success

Freedom from the achievement treadmill

Realization of what becomes possible when you see things differently.

This Unmessable: Preview is Exclusively For...

You've reached a certain level of success, but you're exhausted.

You've hired the right people, built the systems, followed the playbooks - and yet you still experience a bottleneck.

You know something deeper is going on. You just can't see it yet.

You're an entrepreneurs who have finished optimizing tactics and are ready to look at what's actually running the show.

If you're looking for business hacks, formulas, or better things to do - this isn't it.

If you're ready to step into a space where real transformation begins - you're in the right place.

Your Investment...

₱1,497

Original Price: ₱4,999

Limited Special Price!

Limited To 50 Participants Only

Price will increase once limit is reached

Why so few? Because real transformation happens in intimate settings.

No crowd to hide in. No back row to escape to. Just real conversations about what matters.

This is the entry point to a journey that has changed the lives of every entrepreneur who has walked through it.

For ₱1,497, you get your first look at what's possible.

This is the Inner Circle...

Only 20 people will sit at this dinner table.

Think about what happens over a 3-hour dinner.

The formalities drop. The masks come off. The real stories come out.

The deal that almost bankrupted them

The mentor who changed everything

The belief they had to kill to get here

The habit they still do every single day

This is the conversation that changes everything.

Not because it's motivational.

Because it's real.

And you can't Google this. You can't YouTube this.

You can't buy this anywhere else.

After this 10th anniversary?

This level of access goes away.
